title: Better Bamboo Wood
description: Makes bamboo wood more consistent with other wood types while keeping the balance! (4 planks from 1 log; charcoal from smelting bamboo logs)
body:
### DESCRIPTION
 
This datapack simply makes the new bamboo wood from 1.20 behave like other wood types, while also balancing the number of sticks you can get from the same amount of materials.

The list of features are:
1. Bamboo logs can be smelted into charcoal 
2. 1 bamboo log can be crafted into 4 planks (instead of 2)
3. 2 bamboo planks can be crafted into 2 sticks 
4. 4 bamboo can be crafted into a single plank

(go to the gallery tab for images)
### INSTALLATION GUIDE 

go to your saves folder located here on Windows:
```
C:\Users(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves
```
put the zipped file in the data packs folder, and either restart your world or execute /reload

### OTHER THINGS TO NOTE

- the new plank recipe buff is balanced by nerfing the stick recipe as you get 4 sticks from 1 bamboo log and 4 sticks from 9 bamboo as well 
- for feedback, bug reports, or other help, join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/kk3j3ct6xk) from the links section of this page!
